context.projectOverview: Chat Interrupt / Approve / Steer (research Phase 2). Add mid-flight HITL control over chat-spawned runs, reusing the existing disk-approval engine (DiskCheckpointMechanism + approval-state.ts) without rebuilding it. Sprint 1 is the foundation: additive RunState grammar extension (input-required/paused + optional fields), a session-persisted /careful on|off toggle, a careful chat spawn that launches the detached run with curated --approve-gates, and the additive `bober run --approve-gates` flag.
priorPhases: Phase 1 (PR #44): bober chat REPL — pure-reader chat process, detached `bober run --run-id` children, filesystem coordination (.bober/runs/<id>/, .bober/chat/ pid sidecar, history.jsonl tailer, /stop kill-by-PID).
relevantFiles: src/mcp/run-manager.ts (RunState type ~line 35 — extend status union + add optional fields ADDITIVELY)
src/chat/pid-sidecar.ts (shape to mirror for new careful-sidecar.ts)
src/orchestrator/checkpoints/registry.ts + sites.ts (CHECKPOINT_SITES — valid gate ids to validate against)
src/chat/slash-commands.ts (dispatch + HELP_TEXT — register /careful via optional-handler back-compat pattern)
src/chat/chat-session.ts (handleTurn — read careful toggle at spawn time)

keyInvariants: AUTOPILOT BYTE-FOR-BYTE: when careful is off (default), RunSpawner.spawn passes NO --approve-gates and the arg vector is identical to Phase 1. The run-spawner.test.ts:89 arg-vector assertion is the canary — it MUST stay green.

ADDITIVE ONLY: RunState extension adds union members + optional fields; existing statuses and readers (roster.summarize, readRunStatesFromDisk) are unaffected. No exhaustive switch over RunState.status exists (all string-equality ifs) per curator impact analysis.

--approve-gates validation: unknown gate name rejected with a clear error; valid gates sourced from CHECKPOINT_SITES; merges {gate->'disk'} into config.pipeline.checkpointOverrides for THIS run only (override wins over mode).
RunState lives in src/mcp/run-manager.ts:35, NOT run-state.ts (curator correction).
/careful is a SESSION toggle persisted in a chat-scoped sidecar (mirror pid-sidecar.ts under .bober/chat/); /careful with no arg reports current state.
successCriteriaSummary: AC1: /careful on -> spawn passes --approve-gates post-research,post-plan,post-sprint; careful off (default) = no flag, Phase 1 behavior. AC2: `bober run --approve-gates ...` merges {gate->'disk'} into checkpointOverrides for that run only; unknown gate rejected clearly, other gates still apply. AC3: RunState union accepts input-required/paused; optional pendingCheckpointId/pendingPrompt/pendingSince/pausedAt round-trip; existing readers unaffected. AC4: /careful toggle persists across turns in chat sidecar; /careful no-arg reports state; autopilot spawn after /careful off produces no pending markers.
principlesRef: .bober/principles.md (ESM/NodeNext, .js import extensions, no SDK types outside src/providers/, Zod for config, async fs only, collocated *.test.ts, conventional commits bober(sprint-1): ...)
